subcodes.first_line: O Compassionate Lord! Be Thou the succour and shelter of these captives bound by the chains of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند مهربان این اسیران زنجیر محبتت را دستگیر شو وملجاء و پناه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
